title: Clone Repository and Initialize
text: Clone the repository with git clone, then run make init to set up the virtual environment and copy .env.example to .env.local.

title: Configure Environment Variables
text: Edit .env.local and set DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, SECRET_KEY, and LOG_LEVEL. Do not commit .env.local. It is excluded by .gitignore.

title: Start Local Services and Run Migrations
text: Start Postgres and Redis with docker compose up -d. Wait for them to become ready, then run make migrate to apply the database schema.

title: Architecture: No Direct Database Access from API Layer
text: The API layer must not access the database directly. All data access goes through the domain layer. This is a core architectural invariant enforced in code review.

title: Run Tests Before Submitting a PR
text: Run make test to execute the full test suite. Integration tests require Docker services to be running. Use make test-unit for the fast subset during development.
